description_long: This is a rectangular wooden toolbox with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring two wide reinforcing bands running lengthwise along the top and sides. The wood is dark-stained, with visible grain and a slightly weathered finish, suggesting durability and frequent use. On each short end, a prominent rectangular handle is mounted, likely for carrying, and these handles are flush with the surface, giving a sturdy appearance. The top surface is flat and segmented by the reinforcing bands, which may also serve as structural supports. There are no visible hinges, latches, or external compartments, indicating a simple, solid construction. The overall look is functional and industrial, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or construction sites.
description: A sturdy, dark wooden toolbox with wide reinforcing bands and flush rectangular handles on each end, designed for durability and utility.
description_view_0: End view showing a flat wooden face with a large, rectangular handle centered vertically.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the toolbox, with two wide reinforcing bands and a flat, segmented top.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, identical to view 0, with a rectangular handle centered on the face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with reinforcing bands and a flat top surface.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, fixed wooden handles mounted flush on each short end; no ergonomic padding or folding features.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible latch or locking mechanism; the lid appears to be held closed by friction or internal fittings.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal or external compartments, trays, or dividers are visible; the toolbox appears to be a single, undivided container.
